title: RFO-ITS 1940 - eRPA System Enhancements
name: RFO-ITS 1940 - eRPA System Enhancements
statement_of_work: California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection (CAL FIRE) is inviting you to review and respond to this Request for Offer (RFO), entitled RFO-ITS 1940 - eRPA System Enhancements. CAL FIRE utilizes the Electronic Request for Personnel Action (eRPA) system (Power Apps application) to manage classification, hiring, personnel transactions, and recruitment-related workflows.
deliverables: Support end-to-end requirements of program staff
dept: California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection (CAL FIRE)
